name: Samuri Salad Dressing
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the onion, carrot, celery, and ginger in a blender or food processor.
2. Add oil, soy sauce, vinegar, lemon juice, and tomato paste to the blender.
3. Blend all ingredients together until smooth and well combined.
4. Season the dressing to taste with salt, freshly ground pepper, and hot pepper sauce.
